action.description:
Introduced by Senators Habush Sinykin, Roys, Drake, Dassler-Alfheim, Ratcliff, Wall, Spreitzer, Larson and Hesselbein; 
cosponsored by Representatives Miresse, Mursau, Stroud, Madison, Tenorio, Sinicki, Moore Omokunde, Udell, Ortiz-Velez, Anderson, Snodgrass, Emerson, Taylor, McCarville, Fitzgerald, Arney, Joers, Brown, Roe, Palmeri, Andraca, Neubauer, Clancy, Stubbs, Johnson, DeSmidt, Sheehan and Hysell
